# remote_control_lite provenance

This source tree provides the GP001 remote-control Python bindings used by
ioailab teleoperation examples.

- Upstream repository: `ssh://git@git.galbot.com:6043/chenhaozhe/remote_control_lite.git`
- Imported commit: `1a6c90f196d73be03e55a1cf3061f148ef4f3770`
- Package name/version: `remote_control_lite==0.1.0`
- License declared by upstream package metadata: Apache-2.0

The upstream checkout used for this import did not include a standalone LICENSE
file. Keep this provenance file updated when refreshing the vendored source.
